boundaryCorrectnessDetermination.reason: The asset metadata and coordinate envelope are San Jacinto-labeled, but provenance and extraction lineage are insufficient to satisfy visual credibility. Coordinate density alone is not accepted as proof.

ownershipAuditResults.fallbackPolicy: Unknown or unsupported counties remain fail-closed; San Jacinto rows must not match Liberty or Montgomery contexts while activation is held.

visibilityPipelineFindings.heldStatus: Visibility is audit-only because San Jacinto is non-operational and activation-held.

remainingBlockers: Boundary source provenance remains unverifiable from committed evidence.
